recommendations.title: The Other Man
recommendations.overview: The story of a husband who suspects his wife of adultery, and sets out to track down the other man in her life.

recommendations.title: Notes on a Scandal
recommendations.overview: A veteran high school teacher befriends a younger art teacher, who is having an affair with one of her 15-year-old students. However, her intentions with this new "friend" also go well beyond platonic friendship.

recommendations.title: King Lear
recommendations.overview: An aging King invites disaster, when he abdicates to his corrupt, toadying daughters, and rejects his loving and honest one.

recommendations.title: The Children Act
recommendations.overview: In the midst of a marital crisis, a High Court judge must decide if she should order a life-saving blood transfusion for a teen with cancer despite his family's refusal to accept medical treatment for religious reasons.

recommendations.title: The Notebook
recommendations.overview: An epic love story centered around an older man who reads aloud to a woman with Alzheimer's. From a faded notebook, the old man's words bring to life the story about a couple who is separated by World War II, and is then passionately reunited, seven

recommendations.title: Stage Beauty
recommendations.overview: Humble Maria, who outfits top London theater star Ned Kynaston, takes none of the credit for the male actor's success at playing women. And because this is the 17th century, Maria, like other females, is prohibited from pursuing her dream of acting.

recommendations.title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
recommendations.overview: After his classmate and crush is diagnosed with a pancreatic disease, an average high schooler sets out to make the most of her final days.

recommendations.title: A Separation
recommendations.overview: A married couple are faced with a difficult decision - to improve the life of their child by moving to another country or to stay in Iran and look after a deteriorating parent who has Alzheimer's disease.

recommendations.title: A Moment to Remember
recommendations.overview: A young couple's love is tested when Sun-jin is diagnosed with a rare form of Alzheimer's disease.

recommendations.title: Until Forever
recommendations.overview: Until Forever: The Michael Boyum Story is a powerful, true account of one young man's courageous battle with leukemia and his journey of faith.
